subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who desireth to hearken to the melodies of the birds of the Throne, that it may draw him unto the Kingdom of God, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یسمع نغمات طیور العرش لتجذبه الی ملکوت الله العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
